choices: Misty asks a question, noticing something off about Pikachu
Pikachu trips and hurts his foot.
Team Rocket has come to bother them but, they notice something off about Pikachu
Team Rocket come, nobody notices anything off forthe time being
Beock asks another question regarding what Ash will do now he is champion.
1.content:
So, as Ash (who just recently became the Pokémon champion), Pikachu, Brock, and Misty are walking through Cerulean City, Brick asks Ash a question.

"So, you are Pokémon champion now, which must mean you can take longer breaks between catching Pokémon, right?" Brock asked Ash for he liked to cook for Pokémon, and he wanted more time to do that.

Ash answers with, "I don't know, but I do know one thing, Pikachu is really excited!"

Pikachu was hopping down the path, calling his cry with happiness when suddenly...
1.title: The beggining!

choices: Pikachu trips over a rock, hurting his foot
Team Rocket notices something off about Pikachu, and leaves them alone for now
Team Rocket has come to bother them steal Pokachu, and scares away the growth.
Ash notices the semi unnoticeable geowth Pikachu had
Reader's choice on the matter
11.content:
"Hey, guys, does anything seem...off about Pikachu, he almost looks.... bigger? Misty asks.

"Huh, what in the world do you mean?" asks Brock.

"Are you seeing things?" asks Ash

But in reality, Pikachu was 1 and a half time bigger than normal, but being a small Pokémon, Pikachu's small growth is semi-unnoticeable.

Then... something happens
11.title: "Hey, wait a minute" says Misty

choices: Team Rocket jumps out of the bushes, Pikachu grows, and scares them away
Team Rocket steals Pikachu
Nothing happens, and the crew makes it to the ferry albeit with a bigger Pikachu
Jump to where the crew is in Slateport
Reader's choice on the matter
111.content:
"PIKKAA!" yells Pikachu, as he trips over a rock.
"Let's get him to the PokéCenter across the street!" exclaimed Ash

After they were there for a few minutes, Nurse Joy reported his status.
"Only thing wrong is that he will have a slightly sore foot, but he has this very rare disease called gigantism, and the only antidote is made by a man in a country called Hoenn in a city called Slateport City. He will grow at least a little and any given moment and he will never stop until he dies or gets the antidote." Nurse Joy reported to the crew.

Then Pikachu walked into the lobby and he was double his normal size, making that semi-unnoticeable difference, more noticeable!

"Let's go get that antidote!" yells Ash. And off they went
111.title: Pikachu trips over a rock, hurting his foot

choices: Pikachu grows
Meowth pops another joke
Team Rocket gets Wing Attacked by Ash's Charizard
Team Rocket finishes their motto
Reader's choice on the matter
1111.content:
"So it is a ferry we are taking to Slateport, right?" asks Misty

However, before anybody could answer, out come Team Rocket from the bushes!

"Prepare for trouble." began Jesse

"Shut up, you dirty old hag!" retorts Misty

"What did you call me?" asks Jesse through gritted teeth

"How about you mind your buisness and let us get to our ferry!" Ash said

"WHAT DID YOU CALL ME, MISTY?" screams Jesse

"Oh wow, Jesse evolved into a Flareon!" Meowth jokes

Everybody laughs (except Jesse of course) making Jesse more angrier, when this happens...........
1111.title: Team Rocket, NOoOOOOOoOO0!!

choices: It hurt!
It did not hurt!
11111.content:
"Meowth, is Pikachu growing?" asks Meowth

In fact Pikachu had tripled his current size, making 6 times his normal size, making him a 8 foot tall Pikachu!

But now comes the question, did it hurt (the still adorable) Pikachu, or did it not.
11111.title: Pikachu grows

choices: Pikachu Grows
Nothing happens and they make it to the ferry
Misty yells back before Team Rocket blasts off out of view
Everybody rides on Charizard as he flies to Slateport
Reader's choice on the matter
11113.content:
"Forget this!" Ash yells

Ash then released his Charizard

"Charizard, Wing Attack!" Ash commands

"Char!" says Charizard and Wing Attacks Team Rocket

"Team Rocket is blastng off again!" Team Rocket yells
11113.title: Team Rocket Is Blasting Off Again

info.brief_description: Based off of my 7 part story on Ash's Pikachu getting gigantism, this time you choose!
info.description:
Choose what happens in this story based off of a 7 part story I made on Pikachu getting gigantism!


RULES:
1. No changing people into Pokémon or vice verca

2. Please no stuff rated above PG 13 but preferably ASR or E though PG13 will be allowed

3. No INTENTIONAL killing by Pikachu, though ACCIDENTAL killing will be allowed to a degree.

4. Do not be shy, I would love additions to chapters I don't make!
